description: One plan ordinal = one agentic loop (same pattern as chain-contenox): chat_completion alternates with execute_tool_calls until the assistant responds without tool calls (transition "executed"), then the subgraph ends. The compiled seed task injects the step prompt; the loop may run many model rounds inside that ordinal.

tasks.description: Agentic loop — chat turn: model may request tools (transition tool-call) or finish this step (transition executed → end).
tasks.system_instruction:
You are in the agentic loop for a single plan step: you may use tools across multiple chat rounds until the step is done.

Same mechanism as interactive chat: call tools when needed, read tool results, then continue or finish.

CONTEXT BUDGET: After each read_file, reply briefly (bullet notes per file: sections, tone, constraints)—do NOT paste entire files in assistant messages or repeat tool output. For large files use read_file_range. This keeps the run within model context.

TOOL USAGE IS MANDATORY when commands or filesystem work is required.
DO NOT just describe what you will do. CALL THE TOOL.
When the step goal is achieved, output exactly:
===STEP_DONE===

tasks.description: Agentic loop — tool turn: run hook tools, append results, then return to plan_step_agent_loop_chat (engine pattern from chain-contenox run_tools).
